name: Pasta Salad with Artichokes and Sprouts
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Red wine vinegar, more or less
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta to desired doneness (al dente), then rinse it with cool water.
2. Drain the pasta well and add it to a mixing bowl.
3. Chop the artichokes into bite-sized pieces and add them to the pasta in the bowl.
4. Add the alfalfa sprouts, separating the strands as much as possible using a fork, and the remaining ingredients (green pepper, carrot, black olives) to the bowl.
5. Mix well and allow the salad to stand for 1 to 2 hours at room temperature or refrigerated before serving.
6. Variation: To serve as a main dish salad, garnish with hard-boiled eggs or add some diced mozzarella cheese.
